title: Docks
blurb: High-quality custom docks built to last, perfect for waterfront properties.
details: Boat docks, swim docks, gangways, and dock add-ons sized for your shoreline. We build with marine-grade hardware, pressure-treated pine or composite framing, and Trex or IPE decking on request.

title: Custom Decks
blurb: Relaxing, entertaining, or lakefront views. Durable, beautiful decks with attention to detail.
details: Single-level, multi-level, wrap-around, and elevated decks. Pressure-treated pine, cedar, or composite (Trex, TimberTech). Built-in benches, planters, and railings to match.

title: Furniture and Tables
blurb: Custom pool tables, handcrafted furniture, and unique pieces built with precision.
details: Pool tables, dining tables, bar tops, shelving, headboards, and one-off commissions. We work in hardwood (oak, walnut, cherry) and softwood depending on the piece.

title: Interior Trim and Millwork
blurb: Baseboards, crown molding, window trim, and detailed millwork to finish your home.
details: Whole-home trim packages and one-room upgrades. Profile matching for older homes. Painted or stained finish. Shoe molding, casing, chair rail, and wainscoting on request.

title: Outdoor Living Spaces
blurb: Custom pergolas, patios, and living spaces designed to fit your lifestyle.
details: Pergolas, gazebos, outdoor kitchens, fire-pit surrounds, and shaded sitting areas. We can integrate with existing patios, decks, or pools.

title: Repairs and Staining
blurb: Keep your woodwork looking its best. Minor repairs to full refinishing and staining.
details: Dock board replacement, rail repair, deck restaining, furniture refinishing, and water-damage repair. We will quote honestly and refund the consult fee if a piece is not worth the cost.
